prompt_summary: Asked LLM to help design a 110-sample toy dataset simulating iPod mentions within an IT Industry corpus, including justification and scale limitations.
llm_output_summary: LLM suggested a dataset structure with iPod phrases (emerging signal), generic IT phrases (noise), and rare junk phrases (sparsity test) across 6 simulated weeks.
modifications_made: Manually selected phrase names and count values to match realistic proportions. Designed the temporal spike pattern for iPod phrases. Wrote all justification prose independently.
student_declaration: I declare that this JSON file represents an honest record of the LLM usage for this task. The dataset design was independently verified through manual calculation.
